stepTitle: (c2a) Conan wishes to fit a regression line to the data. What would be the slope of the regression line in original units?
stepBody: The correlation coefficient between Touches and Boost Usage was approximately $$0.705$$. The average number of Touches was $$28.54$$ with a standard deviation of $$9.51$$. The average of Boost Usage was $$1773.4$$ with a standard deviation of $$471.7$$.
